heroHeadline:
UAP Disclosure:
Trump Promises Files 'Very, Very Soon' as 25-Day EO Deadline Looms
heroSubtitle: Tracking official government actions, congressional hearings, declassified documents, and institutional statements on Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena. At an April 17 Phoenix rally, President Trump told the crowd a Pentagon review found 'many very interesting documents' with releases coming 'very, very soon' — 25 days before the May 20 executive order 90-day milestone. The Pentagon has still not delivered the 46 classified UAP videos demanded by Congress.
footerNote: This tracker documents official statements, legislative actions, and institutional processes related to UAP disclosure. It does not validate or endorse the claims contained within official testimonies. EDITORIAL NOTE: Events record that officials made specific claims — not that those claims are verified as factually true. All contested claims include opposing positions.
